findings.evidence: `rg -n "prodMap|IsJHolomorphicWithinAt\.prod"` shows only `IsJHolomorphicAt.prodMap` at line 159, `IsJHolomorphicOn.prodMap` at line 167, and `IsJHolomorphic.prodMap` at line 176, while `JHolomorphicProd.lean` exposes the parallel local lemma `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.prodMk` at line 118.
findings.fix: Add the within-set product-map constructor `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.prodMap : ... -> IsJHolomorphicWithinAt (J₁.prod J₂) (K₁.prod K₂) (Prod.map f g) (s ×ˢ t) p`, proved via the within projection lemmas and `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.prodMk`.
findings.issue: `IsJHolomorphicAt.prodMap`, `IsJHolomorphicOn.prodMap`, and `IsJHolomorphic.prodMap` are exposed, but there is no `IsJHolomorphicWithinAt.prodMap` for hypotheses on `s` and `t` at `p.1` and `p.2`.

summary: The product-map surface skips the local-within constructor, leaving the main product rule unusable from the local hypotheses used by the surrounding `J`-holomorphic API.
